# LinkZip Pro - Universal Bulk Downloader

## Mission & Purpose
LinkZip is a premium SaaS web application designed to help researchers, students, and professionals download and bundle multiple URLs into a single ZIP archive instantly. 

## Features
- **YouTube Video Downloads**: Capable of extracting direct MP4 downloads from YouTube links.
- **PDF & Document Batching**: Automatically fetches and bundles research papers from links.
- **Image & Media Bundling**: Zips images and other media files seamlessly.
- **CORS Bypass**: Utilizes an advanced Edge Proxy to fetch files from restrictive academic domains.
- **No Installation Required**: Works entirely in the browser using JSZip, directly delivering a `LinkZip_Bundle.zip` to the user's hard drive.

## Usage
Users simply paste a list of URLs (one per line) into the main text area, select "Batch ZIP", and click download. The app handles metadata extraction, parallel downloading, and high-speed zipping.

## Target Audience
Researchers needing to archive papers, developers needing bulk assets, and anyone who wants to convert a list of URLs into actual files on their computer.

## Technical Details
Built with Next.js 16 (App Router), Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, and yt-dlp. Hosted on Vercel Edge network for ultra-fast performance.
